title: CTAB genomic DNA extraction from Arabidopsis leaf material
author: Diep R R Ganguly

steps.title: Aliquot required volume of CTAB buffer...
steps.instruction: Aliquot required volume of CTAB buffer and heat in water bath at 60 ºC for 5-10 minutes immediately before use.

steps.title: Add 300 µL chloroform and mix...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL chloroform and mix thoroughly with a vortex or vigorous shaking for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Centrifuge samples for 10 minutes at 20,000 rcf
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples for 10 minutes at 20,000 rcf.

steps.title: Add equal volume of ice-cold 2-propanol and mix by inversion
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of ice-cold 2-propanol and mix by inversion.

steps.title: Wash pellet with 1 mL of...
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with 1 mL of 70 % ethanol (mix by inversion).

steps.title: Resuspend gDNA in nuclease-free H 2...
steps.instruction: Resuspend gDNA in nuclease-free H 2 O or low EDTA TE buffer (10 mM Tris-Cl pH 8, 0.1 mM EDTA).

steps.title: Prepare 2% CTAB buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare 2% CTAB buffer. A B 1 Reagent [Cf] 2 hexadecyltrimethylammonium bromide 2% (w/v) 3 NaCl 1.4 M 4 EDTA (pH 8) 20 mM 5 Tris-Cl (pH 8) 100 mM 2% CTAB buffer recipe

steps.title: Add 300 µL / 100 mg...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL / 100 mg leaf tissue of CTAB buffer.

steps.title: Add RNase A solution to a concentration 50-100 µg/mL
steps.instruction: Add RNase A solution to a concentration 50-100 µg/mL.

steps.title: Mix well with a vortex
steps.instruction: Mix well with a vortex. Invert samples by hand to ensure that all ground tissue is in solution.

steps.title: Incubate in water bath at 60...
steps.instruction: Incubate in water bath at 60 ºC for 30 - 60 minutes. Mix tubes periodically by inversion.

steps.title: Transfer upper aqueous (approx
steps.instruction: Transfer upper aqueous (approx. 200 µL) phase to clean tube.

steps.title: Repeat steps 9-10 for a cleaner extract
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 9-10 for a cleaner extract.

steps.title: Remove as much ethanol as possible...
steps.instruction: Remove as much ethanol as possible using a pipette, then allow pellet to air dry for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Test yield and purity of samples...
steps.instruction: Test yield and purity of samples using a Nanodrop and running samples on a 1 % agarose gel.
